channel.title: Posts on Tony's Pizza
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Tony's Pizza

item.title: Weekly Special: Truffle Mushroom Pizza
item.description: This week only—creamy truffle sauce, wild mushrooms, and fontina. A luxurious treat.

item.title: 30th Anniversary Celebration
item.description: Join us March 1st as we celebrate three decades of Tony’s Pizza. Specials, live music, and gratitude.

item.title: New: Gluten-Free Crust
item.description: We now offer a certified gluten-free crust on any pizza. Same great taste, made for everyone.
